@for (tab of tabs; track tab) { } @if (selectedTabIndex === 0) {

@dumbql/cache

Stable Angular 22+ v{{ versionService.currentVersion() }} Source

The cache package provides a normalized, in-memory cache for GraphQL data. It uses a key-value document store where every object is normalized by its __typename + id (or a custom key function), avoiding data duplication and enabling automatic updates.

NormalizedCache

NormalizedCache is the low-level store. It stores entities in a flat dictionary keyed by TypeName:id and references them from query results: 

{{ normalizedCacheCode }}

CacheService

CacheService wraps NormalizedCache as an Angular injectable and integrates with GraphqlService automatically. Install it using provideDumbqlCache: 

{{ cacheServiceCode }}

Garbage Collection

The cache runs a mark-and-sweep GC when memory pressure triggers or when gc() is called explicitly. Unreferenced entities are evicted: 

{{ gcCode }}

Persistence

Cache data can be persisted to localStorage, sessionStorage, or a custom store:

{{ persistenceCode }}

Optimistic Updates

Mutations can provide an optimistic response that is immediately reflected in the cache and rolled back if the server returns an error: 

{{ optimisticCode }}

Type Policies

Customize how specific types are normalized, merged, or read from cache:

{{ typePoliciesCode }}
} @if (selectedTabIndex === 1) {

API Reference

@dumbql/cache
}
